property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\syska\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0ES5s10;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python314\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\WireGuard\;C:\Users\syska\.local\bin;C:\Program Files\Go\bin;C:\Program Files\Tailscale\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\maven4\mvn4\bin;C:\Users\syska\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\syska\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\syska\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\syska\go\bin;C:\Users\syska\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;c:\Users\syska\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-0.4.79-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.
